channel.title: Botton call component detail
channel.description: ola malta, queria saber como é possivel um link chamar uma pagina detalhe de um cpt, ja li topicos aqui no forum mas não me ajudaram o objetivo é que consiga passar o id para um novo componente e chamar esse componente atraves do botao 235/5000 hello guys, I wanted to know how it is possible for a link to call a detail page of a cpt, I've read topics here on the forum but it didn't help me the goal is to be able to pass the id to a new component and call that component through the button.

item.title: Botton call component detail
item.dc:creator: mburridge
item.description:
Hi @hugsaf2132

Do you have a repo that we can take a look at? Please take a look at this post for advice on the information that it’s useful to provide in your question to enable others to help you: About the 🤗 Dev Talk & Questions category

Read full topic

item.title: Botton call component detail
item.dc:creator: hugsaf2132
item.description:
ola malta, queria saber como é possivel um link chamar uma pagina detalhe de um cpt, ja li topicos aqui no forum mas não me ajudaram o objetivo é que consiga passar o id para um novo componente e chamar esse componente atraves do botao
235/5000
hello guys, I wanted to know how it is possible for a link to call a detail page of a cpt, I’ve read topics here on the forum but it didn’t help me the goal is to be able to pass the id to a new component and call that component through the button.

Read full topic
